raw_comment:
I notice that China has the greatest rate of change and the US is staying more constant. Cleaner energy is more used in all the countries. 

I wonder why cleaner energy is more used. I wonder if the economy effects the different type of electricity. 

This relates t me and my community because we are part of the US that isn’t increasing their electricity. They are still using non-clean electricity. 

Title: New World of Clean electricity
